sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32549" key="e)kpa/qeia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκπάθεια</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[πᾰ]</pron>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n32549.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">violent passion,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Longin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">38.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
